---
title: "socket.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/socket.ts"
loc: 40
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.25
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 6.00
overall_score: 5.69
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [WebSocketServer](file://ws)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [Server](file://http)
- [*](file://chalk)

### Exports
- `Set`
- `SubspaceRelay`
- `i`
- `ping`
- `nextPing`
- `delay`
- `actualDelay`
- `message`
